400.description: Validation error or name already exists
Validation error or name already exists
Validation error or benefit type mismatch

409.description: Benefit name already exists for provider

403.description: Forbidden — JWT user does not own the dependant

404.description: Dependant or benefit provider not found

409.description: MRN already exists for this dependant and provider

403.description: Forbidden — cannot access another user's data
Forbidden — cannot update another user's data
Forbidden — cannot complete another user's onboarding

400.description: Validation error or SELF relationship not allowed
Validation error, empty list, exceeds limit, or SELF relationship not allowed
Cannot delete a SELF dependant via this endpoint
Validation error, no fields to update, or SELF not allowed

AccountType.description: Type of financial or health account.

AddressDetails.description: Structured address details for user profiles and insurance documents.

country.description: Two-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Defaults to "IN".

allOf.description: Health, life, or accident insurance policy benefit.

oneOf.description: Health, life, or accident insurance policy benefit.

BenefitDetails.description:
Typed payload stored in `benefits.benefit_details` (JSONB).

Discriminated by the `"benefit_type"` JSON key, matching `common_enums::BenefitType`.

BenefitType.description: Kind of benefit offered by a provider.

ConsultationBenefitDetails.description:
Details for a consultation-type benefit.

Fields will be expanded in the `consultations` module PR.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the consultation covers.

Currency.description:
ISO 4217 three-letter currency codes.

Currently INR only; add variants as the product expands.

InsurancePolicyBenefitDetails.description:
Details for an insurance-policy-type benefit.

Defines the insurance plan parameters: coverage amount, duration,
grace period, and currency. Premium rates are calculated externally
(hardcoded function for now, rate table module later).

All new fields use `#[serde(default)]` for backward compatibility
with existing JSONB rows that only have `description`. Presence of
required fields is validated at the application layer when purchasing.

coverage_amount.description: Total sum insured in major units (e.g., 200000.00 for 2,00,000 INR).

currency.description: Currency for all monetary values in this plan.

description.description: Human-readable description of the policy coverage.

duration_months.description: Policy duration in months (e.g., 12 for annual).

grace_period_days.description: Number of days after policy expiry during which renewal is still possible.

max_dependants.description: Maximum number of dependants (including SELF) that can be covered.

InsurancePolicyMetadata.description: Auxiliary metadata for an insurance policy.

dependant_mrn_map.description:
Maps dependant UUID (as string) → MRN UUID (as string) at the
benefit provider. Populated from the `mrns` table at policy creation.

MandateFrequency.description: Debit frequency for a mandate. Mirrors Juspay's wire enum.

MandateStatus.description: Mandate lifecycle status. Starts at pending; transitions via Juspay status poll/webhook.

Relationship.description: Relationship of a dependant to the primary user.

Salutation.description: Title or honorific for a person.

TimeRange.description:
A half-open time range, with a mandatory start and an optional end.
Designed to be embedded in list/filter query params via `#[serde(flatten)]`.

`Deserialize` runs [`TimeRange::validate`] as part of deserialization, so
callers never receive a [`TimeRange`] that violates `start_time <= end_time`.

end_time.description: Inclusive end time; defaults to "now" when omitted.

Bearer.description: JWT access token. Obtain from /auth/otp/verify endpoint.
